---
title: 'Part II: CMIP6 Convective Variables'
author: "Dr. Searcy"
date: "2025-12-16"
output: html_document
---

Load the required packages: 
``` {r, eval = FALSE}
library(ncdf4)
library(CFtime)

library(lattice)
```

## Open NetCDF Files
### Historical Convective Precipitation
``` {r, eval = FALSE}
ncpath <- "C:/Users/SCHRODEZ/OneDrive - Embry-Riddle Aeronautical University/Desktop/Research_Projects/TornActivity_ssp585/"
ncname <- "CP_monthly_NAmerica_historical" 
ncfname <- paste(ncpath, ncname, ".nc", sep="")
library(ncdf4)
dat_nc <- nc_open(ncfname)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
varname = dat_nc$var$ta$longname
varname <- gsub(" ", "", varname)

time_stamp <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "time")

model <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "model")

lons <- ncvar_get(dat_nc,"lon")
lats <- ncvar_get(dat_nc,"lat")

dat_array <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "prc")

tunits <- ncatt_get(dat_nc,"time","units")

cf <- CFtime(tunits$value, calendar = "proleptic_gregorian", time_stamp) 

timestamps <- as_timestamp(cf) # get character-string times

time_cf <- parse_timestamps(cf, timestamps) # parse the string into date components
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[1,,,]
 


dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))
x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(PRC_model1) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x)

PRC_model1 %>% pivot_longer(cols=c('Lon', 'Lat'),
                    names_to='Date',
                    values_to='prc')

modname <- model[1]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
PRC_model1 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(PRC_model1) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[2,,,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[2]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
PRC_model2 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(PRC_model2) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[3,,,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[3]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
PRC_model3 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(PRC_model3) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[4,,,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[4]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
PRC_model4 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(PRC_model4) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[5,,,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[5]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
PRC_model5 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(PRC_model5) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[6,,,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[6]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
PRC_model6 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(PRC_model6) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[7,,,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[7]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
PRC_model7 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(PRC_model7) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
PRC_historical <- rbind(PRC_model1,PRC_model2,PRC_model3,PRC_model4,PRC_model5,PRC_model6,PRC_model7)
```

###SSP 585 Convective Precipitation

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
ncpath <- "C:/Users/SCHRODEZ/OneDrive - Embry-Riddle Aeronautical University/Desktop/Research_Projects/TornActivity_ssp585/"
ncname <- "CP_monthly_NAmerica_ssp585" 
ncfname <- paste(ncpath, ncname, ".nc", sep="")
library(ncdf4)
dat_nc <- nc_open(ncfname)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
varname = dat_nc$var$ta$longname
varname <- gsub(" ", "", varname)

time_stamp <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "time")

model <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "model")

lons <- ncvar_get(dat_nc,"lon")
lats <- ncvar_get(dat_nc,"lat")

dat_array <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "prc")

tunits <- ncatt_get(dat_nc,"time","units")

cf <- CFtime(tunits$value, calendar = "proleptic_gregorian", time_stamp) 

timestamps <- as_timestamp(cf) # get character-string times

time_cf <- parse_timestamps(cf, timestamps) # parse the string into date components
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[1,,,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[1]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
PRC_model1 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(PRC_model1) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[2,,,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[2]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
PRC_model2 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(PRC_model2) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[3,,,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[3]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
PRC_model3 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(PRC_model3) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[4,,,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[4]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
PRC_model4 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(PRC_model4) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[5,,,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[5]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
PRC_model5 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(PRC_model5) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[6,,,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[6]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
PRC_model6 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(PRC_model6) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[7,,,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[7]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
PRC_model7 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(PRC_model7) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
PRC_ssp585 <- rbind(PRC_model1,PRC_model2,PRC_model3,PRC_model4,PRC_model5,PRC_model6,PRC_model7)
```

### SH06 Historical

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
ncpath <- "C:/Users/SCHRODEZ/OneDrive - Embry-Riddle Aeronautical University/Desktop/Research_Projects/TornActivity_ssp585/"
ncname <- "Shear_monthly_NAmerica_historical" 
ncfname <- paste(ncpath, ncname, ".nc", sep="")
library(ncdf4)
dat_nc <- nc_open(ncfname)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
time_stamp <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "time")

model <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "model")

lons <- ncvar_get(dat_nc,"lon")
lats <- ncvar_get(dat_nc,"lat")
nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_array <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "S06")

tunits <- ncatt_get(dat_nc,"time","units")

cf <- CFtime(tunits$value, calendar = "proleptic_gregorian", time_stamp) 

timestamps <- as_timestamp(cf) # get character-string times

time_cf <- parse_timestamps(cf, timestamps) # parse the string into date components
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,,1]

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[1]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
S06_model1 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(S06_model1) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")

head(S06_model1)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,,2]

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[2]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
S06_model2 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(S06_model2) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")

head(S06_model2)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,,3]

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[3]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
S06_model3 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(S06_model3) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")

head(S06_model3)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,,4]

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[4]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
S06_model4 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(S06_model4) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")

head(S06_model4)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,,5]

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[5]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
S06_model5 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(S06_model5) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")

head(S06_model5)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,,6]

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[6]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
S06_model6 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(S06_model6) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")

head(S06_model6)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,,7]

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[7]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
S06_model7 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(S06_model7) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")

head(S06_model7)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
S06_historical <- rbind(S06_model1,S06_model2,S06_model3,S06_model4,S06_model5,S06_model6,S06_model7)
```

###SH06 ssp585


``` {r, eval = FALSE}
ncpath <- "C:/Users/SCHRODEZ/OneDrive - Embry-Riddle Aeronautical University/Desktop/Research_Projects/TornActivity_ssp585/"
ncname <- "Shear_monthly_NAmerica_ssp585" 
ncfname <- paste(ncpath, ncname, ".nc", sep="")
library(ncdf4)
dat_nc <- nc_open(ncfname)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
time_stamp <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "time")

model <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "model")

lons <- ncvar_get(dat_nc,"lon")
lats <- ncvar_get(dat_nc,"lat")
nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_array <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "S06")

tunits <- ncatt_get(dat_nc,"time","units")

cf <- CFtime(tunits$value, calendar = "proleptic_gregorian", time_stamp) 

timestamps <- as_timestamp(cf) # get character-string times

time_cf <- parse_timestamps(cf, timestamps) # parse the string into date components
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[1,,,]

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[1]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
S06_model1 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(S06_model1) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")

head(S06_model1)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[2,,,]

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[2]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
S06_model2 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(S06_model2) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")

head(S06_model2)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[3,,,]

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[3]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
S06_model3 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(S06_model3) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")

head(S06_model3)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[4,,,]

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[4]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
S06_model4 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(S06_model4) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")

head(S06_model4)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[5,,,]

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[5]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
S06_model5 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(S06_model5) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")

head(S06_model5)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[6,,,]

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[6]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
S06_model6 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(S06_model6) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")

head(S06_model6)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[7,,,]

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[7]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
S06_model7 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(S06_model7) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")

head(S06_model7)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
S06_ssp585 <- rbind(S06_model1,S06_model2,S06_model3,S06_model4,S06_model5,S06_model6,S06_model7)
```

### Historical Convective

### CAPE ml500 historical

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
ncpath <- "C:/Users/SCHRODEZ/OneDrive - Embry-Riddle Aeronautical University/Desktop/Research_Projects/TornActivity_ssp585/"
ncname <- "Convective_monthly_NAmerica_historical" 
ncfname <- paste(ncpath, ncname, ".nc", sep="")
library(ncdf4)
dat_nc <- nc_open(ncfname)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
time_stamp <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "time")

model <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "model")

lons <- ncvar_get(dat_nc,"lon")
lats <- ncvar_get(dat_nc,"lat")
nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_array <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "cape_ml500")

tunits <- ncatt_get(dat_nc,"time","units")

cf <- CFtime(tunits$value, calendar = "proleptic_gregorian", time_stamp) 

timestamps <- as_timestamp(cf) # get character-string times

time_cf <- parse_timestamps(cf, timestamps) # parse the string into date components
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,1,]

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[1]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_ml500_model1 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_ml500_model1) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,2,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[2]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_ml500_model2 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_ml500_model2) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,3,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[3]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_ml500_model3 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_ml500_model3) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,4,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[4]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_ml500_model4 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_ml500_model4) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,5,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[5]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_ml500_model5 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_ml500_model5) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,6,]

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[6]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_ml500_model6 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_ml500_model6) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,7,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[7]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_ml500_model7 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_ml500_model7) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
CAPE_ml500_historical <- rbind(CAPE_ml500_model1,CAPE_ml500_model2,CAPE_ml500_model3,CAPE_ml500_model4,CAPE_ml500_model5,CAPE_ml500_model6,CAPE_ml500_model7)
```

CAPE_s


``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "cape_s")

dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,1,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[1]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_s_model1 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_s_model1) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,2,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[2]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_s_model2 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_s_model2) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,3,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[3]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_s_model3 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_s_model3) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,4,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[4]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_s_model4 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_s_model4) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,5,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[5]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_s_model5 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_s_model5) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,6,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[6]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_s_model6 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_s_model6) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,7,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[7]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_s_model7 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_s_model7) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
CAPE_s_historical <- rbind(CAPE_s_model1,CAPE_s_model2,CAPE_s_model3,CAPE_s_model4,CAPE_s_model5,CAPE_s_model6,CAPE_s_model7)
```

CIN ML500


``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "cin_ml500")

dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,1,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[1]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_ml500_model1 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_ml500_model1) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,2,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[2]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_ml500_model2 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_ml500_model2) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,3,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[3]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_ml500_model3 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_ml500_model3) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,4,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[4]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_ml500_model4 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_ml500_model4) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,5,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[5]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_ml500_model5 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_ml500_model5) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,6,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[6]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_ml500_model6 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_ml500_model6) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,7,]

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[7]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_ml500_model7 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_ml500_model7) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
cin_ml500_historical <- rbind(cin_ml500_model1,cin_ml500_model2,cin_ml500_model3,cin_ml500_model4,cin_ml500_model5,cin_ml500_model6,cin_ml500_model7)
```

cin_s


``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "cin_s")

dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,1,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[1]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_s_model1 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_s_model1) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,2,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[2]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_s_model2 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_s_model2) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,3,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[3]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_s_model3 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_s_model3) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,4,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[4]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_s_model4 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_s_model4) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,5,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[5]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_s_model5 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_s_model5) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,6,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[6]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_s_model6 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_s_model6) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,7,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[7]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_s_model7 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_s_model7) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
cin_s_historical <- rbind(cin_s_model1,cin_s_model2,cin_s_model3,cin_s_model4,cin_s_model5,cin_s_model6,cin_s_model7)
```

srh_lm1km


``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "srh_lm1km")

dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,1,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[1]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
srh_lm1km_model1 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(srh_lm1km_model1) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,2,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[2]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
srh_lm1km_model2 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(srh_lm1km_model2) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,3,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[3]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
srh_lm1km_model3 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(srh_lm1km_model3) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,4,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[4]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
srh_lm1km_model4 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(srh_lm1km_model4) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,5,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[5]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
srh_lm1km_model5 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(srh_lm1km_model5) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[6]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
srh_lm1km_model6 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(srh_lm1km_model6) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,7,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[7]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
srh_lm1km_model7 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(srh_lm1km_model7) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
srh_lm1km_historical <- rbind(srh_lm1km_model1,srh_lm1km_model2,srh_lm1km_model3,srh_lm1km_model4,srh_lm1km_model5,srh_lm1km_model6,srh_lm1km_model7)
```

srh_lm3km


``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "srh_lm3km")

dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,1,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[1]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
srh_lm3km_model1 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(srh_lm3km_model1) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

srh_lm3km_model2 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
nmodels = dim(model)
```

srh_rm3km


``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "srh_rm3km")

dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,1,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[1]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
srh_rm3km_model1 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(srh_rm3km_model1) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
nmodels = dim(model)
```

srh_rm1km


``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "srh_rm1km")

dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,1,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[1]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
srh_rm1km_model1 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(srh_rm1km_model1) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,2,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[2]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
srh_rm1km_model2 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)

```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,3,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[3]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
srh_rm1km_model3 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)

```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[4]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
srh_rm1km_model4 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(srh_rm1km_model4) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,5,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[5]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
srh_rm1km_model5 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(srh_rm1km_model5) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,6,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[6]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
srh_rm1km_model6 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(srh_rm1km_model6) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,7,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[7]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
srh_rm1km_model7 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(srh_rm1km_model7) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
srh_rm1km_historical <- rbind(srh_rm1km_model1,srh_rm1km_model2,srh_rm1km_model3,srh_rm1km_model4,srh_rm1km_model5,srh_rm1km_model6,srh_rm1km_model7)
```

### SSP 585 Convective

### CAPE ml500 SSP585

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
ncpath <- "C:/Users/SCHRODEZ/OneDrive - Embry-Riddle Aeronautical University/Desktop/Research_Projects/TornActivity_ssp585/"
ncname <- "Convective_monthly_NAmerica_ssp585" 
ncfname <- paste(ncpath, ncname, ".nc", sep="")
library(ncdf4)
dat_nc <- nc_open(ncfname)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
time_stamp <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "time")

model <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "model")

lons <- ncvar_get(dat_nc,"lon")
lats <- ncvar_get(dat_nc,"lat")
nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_array <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "cape_ml500")

tunits <- ncatt_get(dat_nc,"time","units")

cf <- CFtime(tunits$value, calendar = "proleptic_gregorian", time_stamp) 

timestamps <- as_timestamp(cf) # get character-string times

time_cf <- parse_timestamps(cf, timestamps) # parse the string into date components
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,1,]

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[1]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_ml500_model1 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_ml500_model1) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,2,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[2]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_ml500_model2 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_ml500_model2) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,3,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[3]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_ml500_model3 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_ml500_model3) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,4,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[4]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_ml500_model4 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_ml500_model4) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,5,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[5]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_ml500_model5 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_ml500_model5) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,6,]

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[6]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_ml500_model6 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_ml500_model6) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,7,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[7]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_ml500_model7 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_ml500_model7) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
CAPE_ml500_ssp585 <- rbind(CAPE_ml500_model1,CAPE_ml500_model2,CAPE_ml500_model3,CAPE_ml500_model4,CAPE_ml500_model5,CAPE_ml500_model6,CAPE_ml500_model7)
```

CAPE_s


``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "cape_s")

dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,1,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[1]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_s_model1 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_s_model1) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,2,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[2]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_s_model2 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_s_model2) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,3,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[3]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_s_model3 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_s_model3) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,4,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[4]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_s_model4 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_s_model4) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,5,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

CAPE_s_model5 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,6,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[6]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_s_model6 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_s_model6) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,7,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[7]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
CAPE_s_model7 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(CAPE_s_model7) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
CAPE_s_ssp585 <- rbind(CAPE_s_model1,CAPE_s_model2,CAPE_s_model3,CAPE_s_model4,CAPE_s_model5,CAPE_s_model6,CAPE_s_model7)
```

CIN ML500


``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "cin_ml500")

dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,1,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[1]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_ml500_model1 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_ml500_model1) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,2,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[2]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_ml500_model2 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_ml500_model2) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,3,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[3]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_ml500_model3 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_ml500_model3) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,4,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[4]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_ml500_model4 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_ml500_model4) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,5,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[5]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_ml500_model5 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_ml500_model5) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,6,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[6]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_ml500_model6 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_ml500_model6) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,7,]

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[7]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_ml500_model7 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_ml500_model7) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
cin_ml500_ssp585 <- rbind(cin_ml500_model1,cin_ml500_model2,cin_ml500_model3,cin_ml500_model4,cin_ml500_model5,cin_ml500_model6,cin_ml500_model7)
```

cin_s


``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "cin_s")

dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,1,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[1]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_s_model1 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_s_model1) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,2,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[2]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_s_model2 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_s_model2) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,3,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[3]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_s_model3 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_s_model3) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
cin_s_model4 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)

```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,6,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,7,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[7]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
cin_s_model7 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(cin_s_model7) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
cin_s_ssp585 <- rbind(cin_s_model1,cin_s_model2,cin_s_model3,cin_s_model4,cin_s_model5,cin_s_model6,cin_s_model7)
```

srh_lm1km


``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array <- ncvar_get(dat_nc, "srh_lm1km")

dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,1,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

lonlat <- as.matrix(expand.grid(lons,lats))
dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[1]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
srh_lm1km_model1 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)
colnames(srh_lm1km_model1) <- c("Lon", "Lat", x, "Model")
```

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
dat_array2 <- dat_array[,,2,]

 

dat_long <- as.vector(dat_array2)

nlon= (dim(lons))
nlat = dim(lats)
ntime = dim(time_stamp)
nmodels = dim(model)

dat_mat = matrix(dat_long, nrow = nlon * nlat, ncol = ntime)

dat.df <- data.frame(cbind(lonlat,dat_mat))

modname <- model[2]
model_name = as.data.frame(rep(modname, dim(dat.df)[1]))
srh_lm1km_model2 <- cbind(dat.df,model_name)

x <- c(timestamps)

```
